---
title: "Courtney Green"
pagetitle: "Courtney Green"
subtitle: "Data Scientist at Georgetown University"

about:
  template: solana
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-width: 28em
  image-shape: round
  id: hero-heading
  links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/courtneyreneegreen
          target: _blank
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/courtneyrgreen
          target: _blank
        - icon: envelope-at
          text: Email
          href: mailto:cgreen@georgetown.edu
page-layout: full

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  
format:
  html: 
    css: index.scss
---

<br><br>


::: {#hero-heading}

As a Master’s student in Data Science with a foundation in public policy, I explore how data can be harnessed to address complex societal challenges. My work focuses on leveraging advanced analytics and machine learning to develop actionable insights that inform equitable, evidence-based policies. By bridging technical expertise with policy understanding, I aim to create innovative solutions that drive meaningful social impact.

[Learn more about me &rarr;](about.qmd){.about-links .subtitle}

:::
<!-- hero-heading -->
